name: Mindmap Viewer
description_en: Turn Markdown outlines, notes, docs, or plans into an interactive mind map—a single self-contained offline HTML file built with markmap.js, featuring white-on-dark styling, expand-by-level control, zoom/export toolbar, and search that keeps matches in context.
description_zh: 把 Markdown 大纲、笔记、文档或计划变成交互式思维导图——基于 markmap.js 的单文件离线 HTML,带白字深底样式、按层级展开控制、缩放/导出工具栏,以及保留上下文的搜索。
long_en: Renders hierarchical Markdown as a navigable SVG tree you can open anywhere offline, making notes and topic structures explorable instead of flat.
long_zh: 把层级化的 Markdown 渲染成可离线随处打开的可导航 SVG 树,让笔记与主题结构可探索,而非平铺。
sec_note_en: Runs a local Python build with vendored markmap libraries to emit an offline HTML file; no network access required.
sec_note_zh: 用本地 Python 构建与内置的 markmap 库生成离线 HTML 文件;无需联网。
